title: tetradiclis corniculata
intro: Tetradiclis corniculata, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a small, perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tetradiclis corniculata include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
